calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samuel Tong, via Zoom, for Louis M. Chou, Conservator.

The court and counsel discuss the delays in resolving this matter and of counsel's and his client's failure to appear at the last calling of this matter and failure to respond to the Examiner's notes and address the court's tentative rulings. Counsel provides testimony regarding the status of this matter and advises that the real property has been sold and is unaware as to the events that led to the property being sold.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission. The Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Text Ruling

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Continued To Sep-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Louis Maxwell Chou and Attorney Samuel Tong to appear on Sep-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the tentative ruling regarding verifying the petition and failure to provide notice has not been addressed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
